nasb.text: The Lord your God will bring you into the land which your fathers possessed, and you shall possess it; and He will prosper you and multiply you more than your fathers.

esv.text: And the Lord your God will bring you into the land that your fathers possessed, that you may possess it. And he will make you more prosperous and numerous than your fathers.

cnv.text: 耶和華你的　神必領你進入你列祖所得之地，使你可以得著這地；他必善待你，他也必使你的人數增多，勝過你的列祖。

ccb.text: 带到你们祖先的土地上，使你们拥有那片土地，比你们祖先更加人丁兴旺、繁荣昌盛。
